description: A minimal blindbox case that checks whether an agent can use the skill to produce a Reverse Tornado loop from a sparse repo.
prompt: Use the available Reverse Tornado OKR skill to inspect this repository and create tasks/reverse-tornado-loop.md. Keep the loop grounded in the files present in the repo. Treat it as a delegated loop: DKR learning checkpoints must come before CKR/PKR promotion, CKR remains measurable context, DKR and PKR are worker scopes, and long-running workers use ten-minute heartbeat check-ins with file-based progress reports under `.okra/workers/<worker-id>/progress.jsonl`. Do not implement product code or create anything outside `.okra/` and `tasks/reverse-tornado-loop.md`.
